_comment.1: Full-sensor probe: grab 5 frames with the DACs untouched (run it
_comment.2: with the FSM parked at bias) and locate the beam, to re-derive
_comment.3: start_x/start_y for the 56x32 configs after any bias or alignment
_comment.4: change. The coarse channels need ~30 s to stabilize after startup,
_comment.5: so probe only once the beam has settled at its parked position.
_comment.6: Read the beam position from probe_full.aylp:
_comment.7: (parse: 40-byte header per frame -- magic u32, 4x u8, log_dim y/x u64 at offset 8 -- then y*x uint8s)
